bridge_equation_v18.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v18 = mean(B_plastic_v17, T_learn, 1 - P_prop, D_feature_v12, 1 - G_brain_v12)
bridge_equation_v18.structure_term: B_struct_v18 = mean(B_struct_v17, T_struct, T_route, 1 - P_prop, D_structure_v12)
bridge_equation_v18.readiness_term: R_train_v18 = mean(R_train_v17, B_plastic_v18, B_struct_v18, R_prop, D_align_v12, 1 - P_prop)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第十八桥开始直接吸收传播级破平台结果，尝试让训练规则从平台期松动迹象转成可持续的传播约束。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第十八桥并回主核，检验平台期松动是否真正开始向工程规则传播。
